pages.text: Sloth is built around crushing weight, burden, and exhaustion. It always deals full damage, but every failure leaves the wielder lazier and less effective.

$(l)Core mechanics$()$(br)$(li)If a hit does not kill, gain $(l)Laziness$()$(li)Shift + Left Click: wide sweep for 75% damage, grants Laziness, and afflicts enemies with $(l)Sloth Weakness$()$(li)Right Click: throw a heavy cube for 75% damage and inflict $(l)Heavy Stun$()$(li)While held, movement speed drops and hunger drains faster
Then combine $(l)Void Ashes$(), the $(l)Tablet of Stillness$(), the $(l)Burdened Flail Idol$(), and a $(l)Nebula Ring$() to forge the final weapon.
